title: Note on nilpotent and solvable algebras
journal: Mathematical Proceedings of the Cambridge Philosophical Society
abstract: In general, the class of a nilpotent linear algebra of dimensionnis at mostn+ 1, and the index, or derived length, of a solvable linear algebra of dimensionnis at mostn. In this note it is shown that, for a nilpotent linear algebra of dimensionnsatisfyingx2= 0 for allx, the class is at mostn; and bounds are obtained for the indices of solvable Lie algebras.
